analysis:
**Best Available Trades:**

**CSP:** NFLX $90 strike, 2026-05-22 expiry, 31 DTE, $1.49/$1.52 bid/ask, 0.27 delta, 19.7% annualized return

**LEAPS:** NVO $20 strike, 2028-01-21 expiry, 640 DTE, $21.25/$22.75 bid/ask, 0.92 delta, 7.0% extrinsic (exceptional timing with 10% IVP near 52w low, but trend shows "base forming" - watch for stabilization)

**Position Income CC:** GOOGL $355 strike, 2026-06-18 expiry, 58 DTE, $11.50/$12.00 bid/ask, 0.39 delta, 21.9% annualized return (profit position, normal weight)

**Post-Spike CC:** IBIT $45 strike, 2026-05-15 expiry, 24 DTE, $1.23/$1.25 bid/ask, 0.39 delta, 41.9% annualized return (extended 9% above MA50)

**IVP Environment:** Mixed volatility with NFLX/GOOGL at 90%+ IVP (expensive), while NVO at 10% IVP offers exceptional LEAPS value despite weak trend action.
